items.title: v0.6.19 Release Notes
items.summary: Added the Changelog / Release Notes module with a release list page and detail pages.

items.title: v0.6.0 Release Notes
items.summary: Added versioned docs, SEO metadata, and richer page-level metadata to improve the core docs experience.

items.title: v0.5.2 Release Notes
items.summary: Fixed a set of stability issues around search highlighting, image preview, and mobile navigation.

items.title: v0.5.0 Release Notes
items.summary: Updated the default navigation structure and export behavior, including one important compatibility change.

items.title: v0.4.8 Release Notes
items.summary: Marked several legacy configuration patterns as deprecated and documented the transition path.
